bucket.description: Specifies the name of the GCS bucket where the object will reside. This must be an existing bucket.

cache_control.description: Defines caching behavior for the object, such as expiration times or caching policies.

content.description: Raw content to be stored in the object. Can be used for small text or binary data.

content_disposition.description: Indicates how the object should be displayed or downloaded, such as inline or as an attachment.

content_encoding.description: Specifies the encoding used for the object, such as gzip or base64, to allow proper decoding.

content_language.description: Sets the language of the object content, using standard language codes like 'en' or 'es'.

content_type.description: Defines the media type (MIME type) of the object, such as 'text/plain' or 'application/json'.

customer_encryption.description: Specifies encryption settings for the object, including the algorithm and encryption key. Requires a valid encryption key.

detect_md5hash.description: Calculates the MD5 hash of the object's content to ensure data integrity.

event_based_hold.description: Enables an event-based hold on the object, preventing deletion until the hold is explicitly removed.

google_storage_bucket_object_source.description: Specifies the source file for the object, typically a local file path or a remote URL.

kms_key_name.description: Specifies the Cloud KMS key used to encrypt the object. Requires valid KMS configuration.

metadata.description: Custom metadata key-value pairs to attach to the object. Useful for adding additional context or information.

name.description: Specifies the name of the object within the bucket. Must be unique within the bucket.

retention.description: Defines retention policies for the object, including mode and retention period settings.

storage_class.description: Specifies the storage class for the object, such as 'STANDARD' or 'NEARLINE'. Determines cost and availability.

temporary_hold.description: Applies a temporary hold on the object, preventing deletion until the hold is removed.

timeouts.description: Configures timeout durations for create, update, and delete operations. Optional per operation.
